matchedText: Course closed for this cycle: Real Estate Finance is no longer accepting applications for this cycle. It is expected to re-open for new applications in early September.
matchedTextAfter: In a competitive international business environment, real estate professionals need a sophisticated understanding of finance, economics and law to succeed. The MPhil in Real Estate Finance has been designed to provide rigorous training in the latest concepts from these three key areas as applied to international real estate markets.
